text.content: 5 radial tire tips to maximize your aggregate and quarry productivity

rich_text.plain_text: 5 radial tire tips to maximize your aggregate and quarry productivity

text.content:
A tire isn’t just black and round, especially for aggregates and quarry operations. Knowing the type of tires that are appropriate for your earthmoving equipment and how to maintain them are equally important as maintaining your machines. By conducting a proper OTR (off-the-road) tire maintenance program, it’ll directly impact your overall safety, productivity and cost.

While OTR tires are built to withstand tough conditions, they also have their limit and knowing these factors will help you properly care for them:

rich_text.plain_text:
A tire isn’t just black and round, especially for aggregates and quarry operations. Knowing the type of tires that are appropriate for your earthmoving equipment and how to maintain them are equally important as maintaining your machines. By conducting a proper OTR (off-the-road) tire maintenance program, it’ll directly impact your overall safety, productivity and cost.

text.content: Knowing tires’ functional attributes and limits will help you understand the importance of tire maintenance. As they’re a costly investment, particularly for mining operations, you don’t want to overlook the importance of maintaining your machine’s tires.

text.content: II. Air Pressure

rich_text.plain_text: II. Air Pressure

text.content: The most important factors on maintaining your off-the-road tires, bias, or radial, is air pressure. Here are six reasons why air pressure maintenance is crucial for your OTR tires:

rich_text.plain_text: The most important factors on maintaining your off-the-road tires, bias, or radial, is air pressure. Here are six reasons why air pressure maintenance is crucial for your OTR tires:

text.content: Having the right air pressure reduces the amount of deflection

rich_text.plain_text: Having the right air pressure reduces the amount of deflection

text.content: Having the proper air pressure provide a better ride and added durability

rich_text.plain_text: Having the proper air pressure provide a better ride and added durability

text.content: When inflated properly, the overall heat levels are kept to a minimum

rich_text.plain_text: When inflated properly, the overall heat levels are kept to a minimum

text.content: Having the proper air pressure provide the best traction and braking

rich_text.plain_text: Having the proper air pressure provide the best traction and braking

text.content: When inflated properly, you get a better control on your vehicle

rich_text.plain_text: When inflated properly, you get a better control on your vehicle

text.content: Proper air pressure allows the optimum level of road hazard absorption

rich_text.plain_text: Proper air pressure allows the optimum level of road hazard absorption

text.content:
The most asked questions we get: when do I check my tires then?

Try to check your tires’ air pressure daily, ideally before each shift, especially on a “cold” tire. Below is how a “cold” tire versus a “hot” tire is defined:

rich_text.plain_text:
The most asked questions we get: when do I check my tires then?

Try to check your tires’ air pressure daily, ideally before each shift, especially on a “cold” tire. Below is how a “cold” tire versus a “hot” tire is defined:

text.content: Cold tire
Hot tire
A cold tire is generally defined as one that has been sitting idle and not used for a minimum of 24 hours. From this point the pressure can be monitored more accurately.

cells.plain_text: A cold tire is generally defined as one that has been sitting idle and not used for a minimum of 24 hours. From this point the pressure can be monitored more accurately.

text.content: As a tire works, its internal temperature will increase, as will its air pressure.

cells.plain_text: As a tire works, its internal temperature will increase, as will its air pressure.

text.content: A hot tire must never be deflated.

cells.plain_text: A hot tire must never be deflated.

text.content: - If the air pressure increases by 20% or more from the cold inflation reading, it’s a sign that the tire is overheating and should cool down or moved to an operation that is less demanding.

cells.plain_text: - If the air pressure increases by 20% or more from the cold inflation reading, it’s a sign that the tire is overheating and should cool down or moved to an operation that is less demanding.

text.content: In addition to ensuring safety, having the proper air pressure allows your OTR tire to maintain its correct shape that’s engineered for its precise performance. Below is a reference on what a properly inflated, overinflated and underinflated OTR tire shape and tread look like:

text.content: III. Avoid road hazards

rich_text.plain_text: III. Avoid road hazards

text.content: There are many road hazards that could occur at a quarry/aggregates site, but below are the top four to avoid:

rich_text.plain_text: There are many road hazards that could occur at a quarry/aggregates site, but below are the top four to avoid:

text.content: Spillage on haul roads: ensure to have your crew clean up the road, rocks and debris can create deep cuts in your tires.

rich_text.plain_text: Spillage on haul roads: ensure to have your crew clean up the road, rocks and debris can create deep cuts in your tires.

text.content: Avoid water: water acts as a lubricant and allows rocks to cut into tires easily.

rich_text.plain_text: Avoid water: water acts as a lubricant and allows rocks to cut into tires easily.

text.content: Avoid spillage: don’t ever overload your machine.

rich_text.plain_text: Avoid spillage: don’t ever overload your machine.

text.content: Curved roads with super elevation: ensure curve roads have proper superelevation.

rich_text.plain_text: Curved roads with super elevation: ensure curve roads have proper superelevation.

text.content: In addition, make sure to check the attributes below at the loading area:

rich_text.plain_text: In addition, make sure to check the attributes below at the loading area:

text.content: Floor: is it smooth and clean?

rich_text.plain_text: Floor: is it smooth and clean?

text.content: Traffic patterns established: do you have a clear traffic pattern for operators to travel?

rich_text.plain_text: Traffic patterns established: do you have a clear traffic pattern for operators to travel?

text.content: Ensure your loader operator have controlled and minimized tire spin.

rich_text.plain_text: Ensure your loader operator have controlled and minimized tire spin.

text.content: Ensure the bucket payloads match the conditions.

rich_text.plain_text: Ensure the bucket payloads match the conditions.

text.content: Are cycle times reasonable and matching the needs?

rich_text.plain_text: Are cycle times reasonable and matching the needs?

text.content: Does dust cause production and safety issues?

rich_text.plain_text: Does dust cause production and safety issues?

text.content: 2. Zipper ruptures

rich_text.plain_text: 2. Zipper ruptures

text.content: Zipper ruptures due to low air pressure. Low PSI can cause tires to over-flex in the sidewall and weaken the structural cables, causing the tire to have rapid air loss.

rich_text.plain_text: Zipper ruptures due to low air pressure. Low PSI can cause tires to over-flex in the sidewall and weaken the structural cables, causing the tire to have rapid air loss.

text.content: 3. Improper mounting

rich_text.plain_text: 3. Improper mounting

text.content: This can lead to a bead separation and potentially break the bead, due to the bead being hung up on the flange and not sitting properly. Tire fitters should always:

rich_text.plain_text: This can lead to a bead separation and potentially break the bead, due to the bead being hung up on the flange and not sitting properly. Tire fitters should always:

text.content: Double-inflate tire at the time of mounting.

rich_text.plain_text: Double-inflate tire at the time of mounting.

text.content: Check the GG ring to ensure it’s equal all around the tire. If the bead is hung up on the rim, deflate and lubricate both the rim and the tire bead.

rich_text.plain_text: Check the GG ring to ensure it’s equal all around the tire. If the bead is hung up on the rim, deflate and lubricate both the rim and the tire bead.

text.content: V. Daily pre/post-shift inspection and why it matters

rich_text.plain_text: V. Daily pre/post-shift inspection and why it matters

text.content:
Tires should be visually inspected before every shift for cuts and impacts that could lead to tire failure. Routine maintenance inspections can lead to discovering deeper cuts that have exposed plies. In these cases, removing the tire and repairing it immediately can extend the life of the tire, increasing the site’s profitability.

Below are the basic components on the tires you should always inspect before each shift daily:

rich_text.plain_text:
Tires should be visually inspected before every shift for cuts and impacts that could lead to tire failure. Routine maintenance inspections can lead to discovering deeper cuts that have exposed plies. In these cases, removing the tire and repairing it immediately can extend the life of the tire, increasing the site’s profitability.

Below are the basic components on the tires you should always inspect before each shift daily:

text.content: Check the face of the tire

rich_text.plain_text: Check the face of the tire

text.content: Check for cuts and tears on the face of the tire. Is anything missing?  Has the lug torn off?

rich_text.plain_text: Check for cuts and tears on the face of the tire. Is anything missing?  Has the lug torn off?

text.content: Check the bead

rich_text.plain_text: Check the bead

text.content: Run your hand all around where the tire meets the wheel.  Is it consistent all the way around?

rich_text.plain_text: Run your hand all around where the tire meets the wheel.  Is it consistent all the way around?

text.content: Check the valve stem

rich_text.plain_text: Check the valve stem

text.content: Check the core. Is it leaking?  Is there a cap on the valve stem?  Is it tight?  Is the valve stem properly seated on the wheel? All of this can be checked by spraying a little bit of soapy water on the stem.  If you see bubbles, you may have a leak.

rich_text.plain_text: Check the core. Is it leaking?  Is there a cap on the valve stem?  Is it tight?  Is the valve stem properly seated on the wheel? All of this can be checked by spraying a little bit of soapy water on the stem.  If you see bubbles, you may have a leak.

text.content: Check the air pressure

rich_text.plain_text: Check the air pressure

text.content:
Make sure the air pressure is at the recommended level.
